run_summary.summary: Apr 17 scan (fifth pass). One new inbound: Goldfish Swim School paid campaign outreach via CreatorOpportunity.com (a creator agency). All previously flagged deals (Aqara, SOJOS, BHG x Walmart, Hawke Media, Flexsteel) already captured in earlier passes today — no new activity on those threads.

suggestions.message: New paid campaign inbound via CreatorOpportunity.com (Cassie/Lilly at cassie@creatoropportunity.com / lilly@creatoropportunity.com). Campaign: 'Let's Talk Parenting, Safety & Swim.' Deliverables negotiable — 1 IG Reel/Post OR TikTok OR YouTube, 1-year content licensing. No specific rate offered; must apply via their form. Reviewing interest in 3–5 days (by ~Apr 22). Came in through the Promotions tab as a mass creator outreach — worth a look if swim/family content fits the calendar, but low priority vs. active deals.
